case_title: ADAMS & SMITH, INC. VS. MOUNTAIN STATES STEEL, INC et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADAMS & SMITH, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MOUNTAIN STATES STEEL, INC SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA FIRST NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-02-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-01-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-18-2012
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ADAMS & SMITH, INC.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-02-2013 CONTINUED TO FEB-20-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-09-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-20-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADAMS & SMITH, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-09-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
